texto: Mere instruction in morality is not sufficient to nurture the virtues. It might even backfire, especially when the presentation is heavily exhortative and the pupil's will is coerced. Instead a compelling vision of the goodness of goodness itself needs to be presented in a way that is attractive and stirs the imagination.
explicacao: Citação de Vigen Guroian sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Mere instruction in morality is not sufficient to nurture the virtues. It might even backfire, es…” articula reflexao, virtue, goodness em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
